name: Power Resource Exploration Inc
summary: Power Resource Exploration Inc., an oil and gas exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of oil and gas properties in Canada. The company was formerly known as Power Oil & Gas Inc. and changed its name to Power Resource Exploration Inc. in October 2011. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Calgary, Canada. Power Resource Exploration Inc. is a subsidiary of Premier Exploration.
